title: React developer tools deterministic evidence bank

items.title: React developer tools: reject the invalid model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this React: Component-Based Browser Applications misconception? Every highlighted rerender must be removed with memoization.
hints: Compare both options with platform semantics and observable user or browser evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct. Use DevTools measurements to find costly work; rerendering itself is normal and memoization needs evidence.
feedback.incorrect: That preserves the misconception. Use DevTools measurements to find costly work; rerendering itself is normal and memoization needs evidence.

criteria.description: Selects the source-linked React: Component-Based Browser Applications correction rather than the documented misconception.
